name: RFC
about: Propose something genuinely undecided, for broader discussion before a decision is made
title: "[RFC] "
labels: rfc

decision already made. An accepted RFC on an irreversible/cross-Engine matter graduates into an ADR
via prompts/create-adr.md. -->

<!-- What's genuinely unresolved, and why it's worth a broader discussion rather than one person
deciding. -->

## Proposal

<!-- The author's actual recommendation — an RFC without one just describes a problem. -->
